metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: Ancient seals have been scattered across the land. Recover them from dangerous dungeons and return them to the altar in Hallowcrest to restore the protective ward.

key_dungeons.name: Hidden Halls
key_dungeons.description: Crumbling pillars mark the way into Hidden Halls. Faint scratching echoes from deep within.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Hidden Halls for the hidden Jade Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.

key_dungeons.name: Burning Sanctum
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Burning Sanctum gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Retrieve the Iron Key from Burning Sanctum
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A powerful artifact lies in the deepest chamber.
